annotation_policy: See attachment_gold_annotation_spec.md for full rules. Singular form, lowercase, merged synonyms, no enumeration context.

gold_attachments.label: Arcline VTC-630
gold_attachments.rationale: Named CNC machine — top-level asset

gold_attachments.label: CAT40 spindle
gold_attachments.rationale: Spindle with CAT40 taper specification; merges 'spindle'

gold_attachments.label: CAT40 holder
gold_attachments.rationale: Toolholder with CAT40 taper interface; merges 'toolholder', 'holder'

gold_attachments.label: drawbar
gold_attachments.rationale: Core mechanical shaft pulling holder into spindle taper

gold_attachments.label: Belleville stack
gold_attachments.rationale: Spring washer stack assembly providing clamp force; merges 'drawbar clamp stack'

gold_attachments.label: drawbar seat
gold_attachments.rationale: Lower seat where Belleville stack registers; merges 'lower seat'

gold_attachments.label: release piston
gold_attachments.rationale: Piston that pushes stack to release clamp

gold_attachments.label: actuator linkage
gold_attachments.rationale: Mechanical linkage from upper cylinder to lower drawbar seat

gold_attachments.label: spindle pull-force test point
gold_attachments.rationale: Physical access point on spindle for pull-force measurement

gold_attachments.label: hydraulic circuit
gold_attachments.rationale: Hydraulic pressure circuit supplying booster cylinder; merges 'hydraulic side of the circuit'

gold_attachments.label: washer
gold_attachments.rationale: Spring washer element within Belleville stack — Fastener > Component

gold_attachments.label: booster cylinder CY-DB1
gold_attachments.rationale: Hydraulic booster cylinder for drawbar actuation — Actuator > Component

gold_attachments.label: unclamp valve SV-UC1
gold_attachments.rationale: Valve controlling unclamp cycle — Actuator > Component

gold_attachments.label: Belleville stack housing BS-DB1
gold_attachments.rationale: Structural housing enclosing Belleville stack — Housing > Component

gold_attachments.label: pressure transducer port PT-UC1
gold_attachments.rationale: Measurement port for pressure transducer reading at booster cylinder

gold_attachments.label: clamp-force gauge
gold_attachments.rationale: Calibrated gauge measuring pull/clamp force; merges 'pull-force gauge'

gold_attachments.label: drawbar alarm
gold_attachments.rationale: Alarm signal indicating drawbar system fault

gold_attachments.label: cutting load
gold_attachments.rationale: Measurable machining load on tool during operation

gold_attachments.label: pull force
gold_attachments.rationale: Measurable drawbar clamping force; merges 'clamp force'

gold_attachments.label: service temperature
gold_attachments.rationale: Measurable target temperature for spindle service warm-up

gold_attachments.label: unclamp pressure
gold_attachments.rationale: Measurable hydraulic pressure during unclamp at booster cylinder

gold_attachments.label: supply pressure
gold_attachments.rationale: Measurable supply-side hydraulic pressure to the circuit

gold_attachments.label: release stroke
gold_attachments.rationale: Measurable release piston travel distance; merges 'stroke', 'hydraulic stroke'

gold_attachments.label: drawbar movement
gold_attachments.rationale: Observable drawbar displacement during actuation

gold_attachments.label: stack height
gold_attachments.rationale: Measurable height of assembled Belleville stack

gold_attachments.label: washer orientation
gold_attachments.rationale: Observable facing direction of each washer in stack; merges 'Belleville stack orientation', 'corrected washer orientation'

gold_attachments.label: release-piston clearance
gold_attachments.rationale: Measurable gap around release piston

gold_attachments.label: washer sequence
gold_attachments.rationale: Observable ordering of washers in stack

gold_attachments.label: stack geometry
gold_attachments.rationale: Measurable geometric parameters of the Belleville stack

gold_attachments.label: spindle temperature window
gold_attachments.rationale: Measurable temperature range for repeatable testing

gold_attachments.label: pressure recovery
gold_attachments.rationale: Observable pressure return behavior after clamp/unclamp cycling

gold_attachments.label: holder retention
gold_attachments.rationale: Observable toolholder holding quality across cycles; merges 'tool retention'

gold_attachments.label: oil trace
gold_attachments.rationale: Observable evidence of oil leakage on actuator or cylinder

gold_attachments.label: tool pull-out
gold_attachments.rationale: Tool pulling out of spindle during machining — primary complaint

gold_attachments.label: weak unclamp feel
gold_attachments.rationale: Weak tactile feedback during unclamp — reported complaint

gold_attachments.label: weak Belleville stack
gold_attachments.rationale: Fatigued Belleville stack with reduced spring force

gold_attachments.label: hydraulic short-stroke
gold_attachments.rationale: Insufficient hydraulic stroke at booster cylinder; merges 'short hydraulic stroke'

gold_attachments.label: inverted washer pair
gold_attachments.rationale: Washer pair installed in reversed orientation; merges 'reversed pair', 'inverted lower Belleville pair'

gold_attachments.label: reduced stack height
gold_attachments.rationale: Stack height below specification due to washer issue

gold_attachments.label: actuator-linkage misalignment
gold_attachments.rationale: Linkage between actuator and drawbar out of alignment; merges 'misalignment'
